intent: Distribute PCR primers from a 96-well 1mL source plate to multiple 384-well destination plates using a P20 multichannel pipette. Transfer specified primer volumes to alternating columns based on sample column counts (1-12 per plate). Dispense N1, RP, N2, and optionally NTC primers to designated wells (A and B rows) with disposal volume calculations and tip optimization across all target plates.

output_schema.protocol_name: PCR/qPCR prep: distribute primers to 384 well plates
output_schema.author: Steve Plonk <protocols@opentrons.com>
